title: stelis palifera
intro: Stelis palifera, also known as the tree orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stelis palifera include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as wounds and ulcers. In herbal preparations, the plant's extracts are often used in the form of infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine.
